style_authority.note: Uses the calm restrained enterprise-console authority and centers the operator's next-hour attention decision.

reference_selection.note: Selects dashboard hierarchy, taste, design-move, token, accessibility, state, and validation guidance at the needed depth.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects equal KPI card soup, decorative charting, and generic tips in favor of an operational priority surface.

evidence_level.note: Correctly labels the evidence L0 prose-only and avoids browser, DOM, screenshot, responsive, or runtime claims.

verified_boundary.note: Clearly separates prompt facts, reasonable structural critique, and all unverified visual, interaction, accessibility, state, and performance behavior.

design_moves.note: Gives a lead-support-queue layout, task-first table, diagnostic chart, contextual inspector, semantic color, controls, and state contract.

scope_control.note: Stays concise at 112 lines, read-only, dashboard-specific, prioritized, and within the requested limits.
